/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/approx2d.dir/approx2d_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/approx2d.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/approx2d.dir/func.cpp.o CMakeFiles/approx2d.dir/task3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/approx2d.dir/task31.cpp.o CMakeFiles/approx2d.dir/approximator2d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/approx2d.dir/plotwidget2d.cpp.o -o approx2d  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.13
